news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.

news.title:
SBI report suggests RBI use forex reserves to stabilize rupee amid West Asia crisis; rupee settled at 94.78/USD.
SBI recommends special FX window for OMCs, notes divergence in onshore-offshore markets due to RBI's open position cap.
news.summary:
SBI report suggests RBI use forex reserves to stabilize rupee amid West Asia crisis; rupee settled at 94.78/USD.
SBI recommends special FX window for OMCs, notes divergence in onshore-offshore markets due to RBI's open position cap.

news.title:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.
news.summary:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.

news.title:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.
news.summary:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.

news.title:
RBI plans new rules on onshore forex positions amid rupee volatility, says ex-SBI Chairman Dinesh Khara.
Abizer Diwanji notes banks with $18-20B net forex positions may face losses due to this move.
news.summary:
RBI plans new rules on onshore forex positions amid rupee volatility, says ex-SBI Chairman Dinesh Khara.
Abizer Diwanji notes banks with $18-20B net forex positions may face losses due to this move.

news.title:
SBI sees valuation shift, leading to a downgrade from Buy to Hold.
The change reflects market dynamics, valuation concerns, and peer analysis.
news.summary:
SBI sees valuation shift, leading to a downgrade from Buy to Hold.
The change reflects market dynamics, valuation concerns, and peer analysis.

news.title:
State Bank of India held its General Meeting on March 27, 2026, via VC/OAVM to approve material related party transactions.
The meeting saw participation by directors, quorum presence, and e-voting facilitated by NSDL; results to be shared on exchanges and websites.
news.summary:
State Bank of India held its General Meeting on March 27, 2026, via VC/OAVM to approve material related party transactions.
The meeting saw participation by directors, quorum presence, and e-voting facilitated by NSDL; results to be shared on exchanges and websites.

news.title:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).
news.summary:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
CBI searches Reliance Telecom office, ex-directors' residences over alleged bank fraud of ₹114.98 cr.
FIR registered against former directors Satish Seth and Gautam B Doshi for alleged fraud.
news.summary:
CBI searches Reliance Telecom office, ex-directors' residences over alleged bank fraud of ₹114.98 cr.
FIR registered against former directors Satish Seth and Gautam B Doshi for alleged fraud.

news.title:
SBI's Soumya Kanti Ghosh warns rising crude prices to $100-110/bbl could widen India's trade deficit, adding $30-40B in import costs.
Ghosh predicts gold, silver correction due to a strong USD, higher US yields, and central bank gold sales despite recent price upticks.
news.summary:
SBI's Soumya Kanti Ghosh warns rising crude prices to $100-110/bbl could widen India's trade deficit, adding $30-40B in import costs.
Ghosh predicts gold, silver correction due to a strong USD, higher US yields, and central bank gold sales despite recent price upticks.

news.title:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.
news.summary:
Banking sector valuations attract post US-Iran war correction; ICICI Bank, SBI, Federal Bank top picks.
Nifty PSU Bank index fell 16%, Nifty Private Bank declined 14.5%; Axis Securities favours strong liability franchises.

news.title:
SBI raised Rs 6,051 crore via Tier 2 bonds at a 7.05% coupon rate, marking its second issuance this fiscal to strengthen capital.
Tier 2 bonds attract investors due to pricing and fixed duration, while demand for AT1 bonds declines amid higher risk concerns.
news.summary:
SBI raised Rs 6,051 crore via Tier 2 bonds at a 7.05% coupon rate, marking its second issuance this fiscal to strengthen capital.
Tier 2 bonds attract investors due to pricing and fixed duration, while demand for AT1 bonds declines amid higher risk concerns.

news.title:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.
news.summary:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.

news.title:
SBI corrects bond allotment from 1 crore to 6,051 bonds with 1 crore face value each.
The 7.05% coupon rate bonds are non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, and unsecured Tier 2 under Basel III.
news.summary:
SBI corrects bond allotment from 1 crore to 6,051 bonds with 1 crore face value each.
The 7.05% coupon rate bonds are non-convertible, taxable, redeemable, and unsecured Tier 2 under Basel III.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
news.summary:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.

news.title:
SBI executed a block trade of ~384,256 shares at Rs. 1039.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 39.95 crores.
news.summary:
SBI executed a block trade of ~384,256 shares at Rs. 1039.8.
The total trade value amounted to Rs. 39.95 crores.

news.title:
SBI's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, signaling recalibrated price attractiveness.
SBI outperformed Sensex across timeframes; analysis compares its valuation with public sector peers.
news.summary:
SBI's valuation shifted from very expensive to expensive, signaling recalibrated price attractiveness.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.

news.title:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.
